scripts.dev:api: node -e "const {spawn}=require('child_process'); const path=require('path'); const python=path.join(process.cwd(),'.venv','Scripts','python.exe'); const p=spawn(python,['-c','import uvicorn; uvicorn.run(\"api.main:app\", host=\"127.0.0.1\", port=8001)'],{stdio:'inherit'}); p.on('exit', c=>process.exit(c ?? 0));"
